name: Russian Beef Stroganoff- with Coke
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Chuck steak, OR boneless round steak
2 oz Mushrooms, with liquid (1-2 oz can)
Mashed potatoes, noodles, OR rice, cooked and hot
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut beef into 1/2-inch strips. Place in a plastic bag with 3 tablespoons of flour and the salt. Shake until the meat is evenly coated.
2. In a heavy skillet or Dutch oven, heat oil/shortening. Add the meat strips and brown slowly, stirring often.
3. Add onion, garlic, COCA-COLA, and 1/4 cup of water to the skillet. Mix well.
4. Cover and simmer for 30 to 45 minutes, or until the meat is fork-tender.
5. In a bowl, mix 2 tablespoons of flour with 1/2 cup of water until smooth.
6. Stir the mixture into the skillet along with Worcestershire sauce and undrained mushrooms. Continue stirring until thickened, about 2 to 3 minutes.
7. (If making ahead for reheating later, do not add sour cream now. Reheat, then complete the recipe directions.)
8. Stir in the sour cream and gently heat until the gravy simmers.
9. Sprinkle with parsley and serve over potatoes, noodles, or rice.
Makes 6 servings or 3 cups.
